description: A veterinarian has treated a sick animal and needs to record the medication administered to maintain compliance and track withdrawal times.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific animal that was treated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct animal from the herd database.

nodes.task_description: Record the details of the treatment: medication name, dosage, date, and administering veterinarian.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters all treatment details into the animal's health record.

nodes.task_description: Automatically calculate and record the meat and/or milk withdrawal period based on the medication's label.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the correct withdrawal date and flags the animal in the system.
